entities.name: STRIGA HERMONTHICA
entities.description: A parasitic weed that infects cereal crops such as sorghum and millet.

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop that can support Striga from both sorghum and millet hosts.

entities.name: MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop that only supports Striga from millet hosts.

entities.name: POT EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Experimental trials conducted in pots to test the specificity of Striga hermonthica.

entities.name: CROP SPECIFICITY
entities.description: The phenomenon where a parasite shows preference or restriction to specific host crops.

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL SPECIALIZATION
entities.description: The adaptation of a parasite to a specific host based on the intensity of the host's cultivation.

entities.name: HOST SPECIFICITY
entities.description: The degree to which a parasite is restricted to a particular host species.

entities.name: LATITUDES 10°42'N TO 13°29'N
entities.description: The geographical range from which Striga seed samples were collected.
